name: MDZS RP
description:
Pure freedom—plot it to your taste and color! Want pre-written scenarios? Those are available too!

𓇼 ⋆. ̊ 𓆉 𓆝 𓆡 ⋆. ̊ 𓇼

Quite recently, my favorite author deleted their account...along with the bot about this novel..

I was so upset that I decided to create my own!

𓇼 ⋆. ̊ 𓆉 𓆝 𓆡 ⋆. ̊ 𓇼

𓇼 ⋆. ̊ 𓆉 𓆝 𓆡 ⋆. ̊ 𓇼

This is my first bot of this scale. Just a heads-up! I'm not a native English speaker, so there may be some grammar issues—my sincere apologies in advance for that.

If you have any requests or find an error in the lorebook, please leave a comment and I'll do my best to fix it quickly. I'll create a Google Form for your suggestions later ♡
